title: ChatGPT To MC
description: This project allows for users to add their own API key to allow ChatGPT to communicate through their account.
body:
**ChatGPT To MC Chat** is a Fabric mod that connects Minecraft chat to OpenAI's language models. It allows players to interact with an AI directly from the in-game chat interface.

The mod listens for the specific trigger phrase "hey chatgpt" followed by a prompt. When detected, it sends the text to OpenAI and displays the response in the chat window.

Features include: 
**In-game configuration**, using ModMenu, which includes configs such as cooldown, an allowlist, and instructions on how the model should act.
**Model selection**, you can switch between models such as gpt-4o and gpt-4-turbo in the menu
**Baritone integration**, if baritone is installed, you can enable "baritone mode" in which ChatGPT will be able to use baritone to perform functions.

**Before downloading, please note the following:**
**API Key Required:** You must provide your own OpenAI API key. This mod does not provide free access to OpenAI services.

**ModMenu Dependency:** You must have ModMenu installed to access the configuration screen and enter your API key.

**ASCII Limitation:** To prevent chat crashes and display issues, the mod automatically strips emojis, newlines, and non-ASCII characters from AI responses.

**Network:** The mod requires an active internet connection to communicate with OpenAI's servers.

**KEEP IN MIND** this mod is still in beta, its my first mod i was just rushing to get it posted, please report any bugs [here](https://github.com/dosetapped/chatgpt-to-mc/issues)
